title: OCSMP Extras
description: Extra resource pack features for OCSMP
body:
OCSMP Extras is a resource pack designed for use on the [OCSMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ocsmp) Server. It adds many tweaks and other fun features. This pack was formerly integrated into the server resource pack but has now become it's own separate thing!

Requires Optifine/alternatives.
